# Simplest Notes

> Simple, fast, ad-free, and offline-first note-taking app for Android. 
> Available on RuStore, GitHub Releases, and F-Droid. Works 100% offline.

## App Info
- [Homepage](https://trase1.github.io/Simplest-Notes/)
- [Source Code](https://github.com/Trase1/SimplestNotes-app)


## Download Options
- [RuStore](https://apps.rustore.ru/app/com.traseapps.simplestNotes)
- [APK from GitHub](https://github.com/Trase1/SimplestNotes-app/releases/latest)
- [F-Droid / IzzyOnDroid](https://apt.izzysoft.de/fdroid/index/apk/com.traseapps.simplestNotes)

## Features
- One-tap note creation.
- Color-coded priorities.
- 100% offline data storage.
- No ads.
- Open-source (MIT license).

## Changelog & Releases
- [Latest Release Notes](https://github.com/Trase1/SimplestNotes-app/releases/latest)
